summary: Venda Mista (Mixed Sale) feature testing completed. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tested - fixed syntax error (duplicate `)}`) in VendasPage.js. The feature allows creating direct sales with mixed items (immediate delivery + to produce), with automatic order creation for production items.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Duplicate `)}` on line 866 causing syntax characters to display in UI

warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning)
HTML hydration warning - span cannot be child of option element

critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate `)}` syntax error in VendasPage.js line 866 - FIXED
Automatic order creation for 'a_produzir' items happens in frontend (VendasPage.js handleSubmit), not backend - this is by design
Stock movement only occurs for 'imediata' items - verified working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Venda Mista flows working after fix)

seed_data_creation: Test sales and orders created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venda Mista feature fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Mixed sales with 'imediata' and 'a_produzir' items, 2) 'Produção' badge displayed for sales with tem_itens_a_produzir=true, 3) Stock movement only for immediate items, 4) Sabores (flavors) saved correctly in items, 5) Orders can be linked to sales via venda_vinculada_id and origem='venda_mista'.

frontend_tests.nova_venda_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with Venda de Pedido and Venda Direta options
frontend_tests.venda_direta_form: PASS - 2-step form with Entrega Imediata and A Produzir buttons
frontend_tests.producao_badge: PASS - 7 sales showing Produção badge in list

features_tested.criar_venda_mista: PASS - Can create direct sale with mixed items (imediata + a_produzir)
features_tested.pedido_automatico: PASS - Backend supports creating orders linked to sales via venda_vinculada_id
features_tested.movimentacao_estoque: PASS - Stock movement only for 'imediata' items, not 'a_produzir'
features_tested.indicador_producao: PASS - Sales list shows 'Produção' badge for sales with tem_itens_a_produzir=true
features_tested.sabores_salvos: PASS - Flavors (sabores) saved and returned correctly in items
